supporting_evidence: Dramatic use of shadows and deep blacks in the sterile bureaucratic office environments
High contrast lighting in the night-time bar scenes, emphasizing the protagonist's solitude and despair
The iconic final scene on the swing in the snow, where the stark contrast between Watanabe's dark figure and the white snow creates a powerful visual and emotional impact
Overall cinematography prioritizes strong, impactful compositions and a deliberate balance of light and shadow to convey narrative weight
